name: Attention Degradation, Function Token Anchoring, and the Limits of Attention-Based Intervention in Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.20524v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mean cross-positional attention degradation is widely reported in transformer interpretability, yet whether it causally limits contextual retrieval r...
description: arXiv:2607.20524v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Mean cross-positional attention degradation is widely reported in transformer interpretability, yet whether it causally limits contextual retrieval remains untested. We present six coordinated experiments across GPT-2, LLaMA-3.2-1B/3B, OPT-1.3B, and distilgpt2. We first characterise short-term (5-100 token) attention degradation, finding a univers...
author: Sagar Dangal, Manoj Shakya
